description: User swipes horizontally through the opportunity cards carousel at the top of the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is browsing different survey and interview opportunities by swiping the top carousel.

description: User clicks the filter icon in the top right corner.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and clicks the filter icon.
A modal overlay appears with various filtering options like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate.

description: User scrolls down within the Filter Opportunities modal to see more options.
frame_description: The user is navigating through the filter settings, moving past Task Type and Duration to Pay Rate and Device options.
